name: Hourly LINE task reconciliation
purpose: Every hourly LINE check decides whether new messages update existing tasks or create genuinely new event tasks.
inputs: latest AMCore shared task judgment rules
active manual judgment rules submitted from User UI
new LINE messages since previous run
recent meeting records and report decisions when available
coreQuestion: Is this new message an extension/status update/evidence for an existing task, or is it a new event that needs a new task?

decisionFlow.name: Load latest judgment rules
decisionFlow.rule: Before judging any message, load AMCore shared rules, project-local judgment rules, learned calibration rules, and active manual User UI rules. Do not rely only on hard-coded logic.

decisionFlow.name: Load new messages
decisionFlow.rule: Read new LINE messages in the hourly window before judging tasks.

decisionFlow.name: Recover conversation context
decisionFlow.rule: For each new message, read earlier messages from the same LINE group, room, or user so the message is judged inside its event thread.

decisionFlow.name: Search active tasks
decisionFlow.rule: Search the total-control task database for active tasks related by project, group, people, subject, delivery, dates, source page, or prior evidence.

decisionFlow.name: Prefer updating existing tasks
decisionFlow.rule: If the new message reasonably extends, answers, blocks, completes, changes, or clarifies an existing task, update that task instead of creating a new one.

decisionFlow.name: Create new task only for new events
decisionFlow.rule: If no existing task can absorb the message and the message contains a real action, owner, delivery, decision, risk, or follow-up need, create a new event-level task only after source evidence can be written into the task body or source/evidence fields.

decisionFlow.name: Suppress background
decisionFlow.rule: If the message is background, acknowledgement, duplicate, test text, pure knowledge sharing, or a record with no action, mark it as judged without creating a task.

requiredUse: existing task update vs new task decision
judgmentRuleLoadingPolicy.evidenceRequirement: When a loaded rule materially changes the result, record the applied rule name or id in the task evidence, message judgment log, or calibration trace.
judgmentRuleLoadingPolicy.failurePolicy: If rules cannot be loaded, record a warning and use the safest fallback behavior. Do not silently ignore rule loading failure.

existingTaskUpdateSignals: a meeting time or attendance was confirmed
a file or attachment was delivered
someone says they will handle it
someone changes the owner, date, scope, or next step
a related group provides indirect completion evidence
newEventSignals: new subject not connected to active tasks
new financial, HR, legal, tax, or customer-risk issue
new follow-up whose owner or expected result is distinct from existing tasks

outputs.name: update_existing_task
outputs.description: Update status, next step, owner, due date, evidence, or task title on an existing task.

outputs.name: create_new_event_task
outputs.description: Create one event-level task, not one task per message.

outputs.name: mark_judged_no_task
outputs.description: Mark the message judged when it is background, duplicate, test text, acknowledgement, or non-actionable record.

outputs.name: request_confirmation
outputs.description: Ask the project owner when the message is important but cannot be safely mapped or closed.

sourceEvidenceGate.rule: A formal task cannot be created without project-local source evidence in the task body or source/evidence fields.
acceptedEvidenceTypes: LINE conversation or message reference with group, time, sender, content, and media/file reference when present
meeting record reference with checkbox item, decision paragraph, or nearby discussion
daily report clue with report slot and decision trace
system suggestion trace with underlying source record
attachment or file reference linked to the source message or project record
sourceEvidenceGate.failurePolicy: If source evidence cannot be attached, do not create a confirmed formal task. Recover the source, create a candidate/pending-confirmation item, or log the failure for review.

avoid: keeping completed one-time operations as active tasks
creating tasks from pure background or system-introduction messages
requiredEvidenceOnUpdate: why the existing task was updated
requiredEvidenceOnCreate: source conversation, meeting, report, suggestion, attachment, or linked source page
source excerpt or enough linked context for audit
reason the source creates a task
project goal or candidate project goal

taskBodyEvidenceLogStandard.rule: Hourly reconciliation must write task creation and task update evidence into the task body using the 任務控制紀錄 / 證據與處理紀錄 format. The separate 來源原文 property is compatibility-only and must not be the authoritative evidence store.
requiredOnCreate: create the 任務控制紀錄 body
write 目前任務摘要 and 最新判斷
write the first 證據與處理紀錄 entry
include 來源原文, 證據摘要, AM 判斷, 處理結果, 狀態變更, 下一步, and 關聯規則
requiredOnUpdate: append a new 證據與處理紀錄 entry
do not overwrite older evidence records
keep 來源位置 clickable when the LINE conversation master page is known
write the source original inside the matching record before the evidence summary
